title: CMAT Shares “The Jamie Oliver Petrol Station” Video With Jamie Oliver, Covers Girls Aloud With Katy J Pearson
author: Danielle Chelosky
summary:
Last year CMAT stole the spotlight with her latest record EURO-COUNTRY, which was nominated for a Mercury Prize (it ended up going to Sam Fender's People Watching). The Irish singer-songwriter made her triumphant TV debut in September on Kimmel, and last month she brought a grandiose performance to Colbert. Now, she recruited none other than British celebrity chef Jamie Oliver for her EURO-COUNTRY track "The Jamie Oliver Petrol Station."

The post
full_text:
Last year CMAT stole the spotlight with her latest record EURO-COUNTRY, which was nominated for a Mercury Prize (it ended up going to Sam Fender's People Watching). The Irish singer-songwriter made her triumphant TV debut in September on Kimmel, and last month she brought a grandiose performance to Colbert. Now, she recruited none other than British celebrity chef Jamie Oliver for her EURO-COUNTRY track "The Jamie Oliver Petrol Station."

CMAT has been on a UK and European tour, and earlier this week she also covered Girls Aloud's 2005 hit "Biology" with Katy J Pearson at the O2 Victoria Warehouse in Manchester. See that belong along with the music video for "The Jamie Oliver Petrol Station," which is directed by Eilís Doherty.
